title: Flexible dual-form nicotine replacement therapy or varenicline in comparison with nicotine patch for smoking cessation: a randomized controlled trial
notes: Smoking cessation in general smokers - tobacco use disorder is not a DSM-5 diagnosed mental health condition targeted here; NRT/varenicline targets nicotine dependence not a primary MH disorder

title: Ketamine-based anesthesia improves electroconvulsive therapy outcomes: a randomized-controlled study
notes: RCT of ketamine vs propofol anesthesia for ECT in treatment-resistant MDD; Canadian site (Saskatchewan); pharma targeting MH; results 2018

title: Agitation Oxidative Stress and Cytokines in Alzheimer Disease: Biomarker Analyses From a Clinical Trial With Nabilone for Agitation
notes: Secondary biomarker analysis from nabilone trial in AD agitation - not main results paper; secondary analysis excluded

title: Use of medium chain triglyceride (MCT) oil in subjects with Alzheimer disease
notes: MCT oil is a nutritional supplement not a pharmacological intervention; N=20 very small but above threshold; however non-pharma excludes

title: Correction: Clinical utility of combinatorial pharmacogenomic testing in depression
notes: This is a correction/erratum to a previously published paper - not a primary results publication

title: Vortioxetine for the treatment of post-COVID-19 condition: a randomized controlled trial
notes: Post-COVID-19 condition is not a DSM-5 diagnosed mental health disorder; cognitive deficits and mood symptoms secondary to PCC not primary MH diagnosis

title: Comparative effectiveness research trial for antidepressant incomplete and non-responders with treatment resistant depression (ASCERTAIN-TRD)
notes: Multi-site US trial; no Canadian site or PI identified from author list; aripiprazole augmentation vs rTMS vs venlafaxine switch - includes non-pharma arm; no clear Canadian involvement

title: Evaluation of the effectiveness and safety of olanzapine as an adjunctive treatment for anorexia nervosa in adolescents: An open-label trial
notes: Non-randomized open-label trial - not an RCT; observational design excluded

title: Efficacy and Safety of ABT-126 in Subjects with Mild-to-Moderate Alzheimer Disease
notes: RCT of ABT-126 (alpha7 nAChR agonist) in mild-moderate AD; multicenter including Canadian site (Gauthier is Canadian PI); pharma for MH; results 2016

title: Brexpiprazole as adjunctive treatment of major depressive disorder with anxious distress
notes: Post-hoc analysis of two phase 3 RCTs - secondary/post-hoc analysis excluded; not primary results

title: Effects of armodafinil and CBT-I on sleep continuity and daytime sleepiness in cancer survivors
notes: Cancer survivors with insomnia - insomnia secondary to cancer not primary DSM-5 MH diagnosis; also secondary outcome analysis of trial

title: Housing First Improves Adherence to Antipsychotic Medication Among Formerly Homeless Adults With Schizophrenia
notes: Housing First intervention - not a pharmacological intervention; measures adherence to antipsychotics but intervention is housing

title: Oxidative stress predicts depressive symptom changes with omega-3 fatty acid treatment in coronary artery disease patients
notes: Secondary analysis of CAROTID trial; depressive symptoms in CAD patients - not primary MH diagnosis; secondary analysis excluded

title: Mavoglurant Augmentation in OCD Patients Resistant to SSRIs
notes: RCT of mavoglurant augmentation for treatment-resistant OCD (DSM-IV-TR); multicenter pharma trial; phase 2; need to verify Canadian site but multicenter international trial

title: Effects of CBT-I and armodafinil on quality of life in cancer survivors
notes: Secondary outcome analysis of same cancer survivor insomnia trial as 27318221; not primary MH; secondary analysis

title: Tolerability of cariprazine in the treatment of acute bipolar I mania
notes: Post-hoc pooled analysis of 3 phase II/III studies - secondary/pooled analysis excluded

title: The OPTIMA study buprenorphine/naloxone and methadone models of care for prescription opioid use disorder
notes: Study protocol/design paper - no main results reported; protocol without results excluded

title: A pilot dose finding study of pioglitazone in autistic children
notes: Single-arm dose-finding study with placebo run-in but no randomized comparison group - not a proper RCT design

title: Effects of suvorexant on the Insomnia Severity Index in patients with insomnia
notes: Pooled analysis of two phase 3 trials - secondary/pooled analysis; also no Canadian involvement evident

title: A patient decision aid for antidepressant use in pregnancy: Pilot RCT
notes: RCT of a patient decision aid (educational intervention) not a pharmacological intervention; non-pharma excluded

title: An increase in plasma BDNF levels is related to n-3 PUFA efficacy in first episode schizophrenia: secondary outcome analysis of the OFFER trial
notes: Secondary outcome analysis of OFFER trial - secondary analysis excluded; also conducted in Poland not Canada

title: Change in Defense Mechanisms and Depression in a Pilot Study of Antidepressive Medications Plus Psychotherapy
notes: Pilot study N=12; well below minimum threshold; also focus is on defense mechanisms (psychological measure) not primary drug efficacy

title: Pharmacogenomics guided versus standard antidepressant treatment in a community pharmacy setting
notes: RCT of pharmacogenomics-guided vs standard antidepressant treatment for MDD/GAD; Canadian community pharmacies; N=213; pharma for MH; results 2021

title: Metformin for early comorbid glucose dysregulation and schizophrenia spectrum disorders
notes: Metformin targets metabolic comorbidity (glucose dysregulation) not mental health symptoms directly; primary outcomes are metabolic (HbA1c fasting glucose insulin resistance) not psychiatric

title: Neurocognitive aspects of ketamine and esketamine on subjects with treatment-resistant depression
notes: Conducted in Brazil (Brazilian authors and journal); no Canadian site or PI; non-Canadian excluded

title: Association of Molecular Senescence Markers in Late-Life Depression With Clinical Characteristics and Treatment Outcome
notes: Non-randomized open-label clinical trial; also secondary biomarker analysis; not an RCT

title: Duration of Adjunctive Antidepressant Maintenance in Bipolar I Depression
notes: RCT of maintenance adjunctive antidepressant (escitalopram/bupropion) vs placebo in bipolar I depression; Canadian-led multisite trial (Yatham lead author UBC); NEJM 2023; pharma for MH

title: Blarcamesine for the treatment of Early Alzheimer Disease: ANAVEX2-73-AD-004 Phase IIB/III trial
notes: Multicenter trial in 5 countries (Australia primarily); no Canadian site identified; non-Canadian excluded

title: Phase II (NAVIGATE-AD study) Results of LY3202626 Effects on Patients with Mild Alzheimer Disease Dementia
notes: No Canadian site or PI identified from author list; US-based Eli Lilly trial; non-Canadian excluded

title: Combining moderators to identify clinical profiles of patients who will and will not benefit from aripiprazole augmentation for treatment resistant late-life MDD
notes: Exploratory secondary moderator analysis of a prior RCT - secondary analysis excluded

title: Use of the EMPOWER brochure to deprescribe sedative-hypnotic drugs in older adults with mild cognitive impairment
notes: Post-hoc analysis of EMPOWER trial; educational brochure intervention not pharmacological; deprescribing study; non-pharma and secondary analysis

title: Mens and womens response to treatment and perceptions of outcomes in injectable opioid assisted treatment for severe opioid use disorder
notes: Secondary analysis of SALOME trial examining gender differences - secondary analysis excluded

title: Oxidative stress reduction related to the efficacy of n-3 PUFA in first episode schizophrenia: Secondary outcome analysis of the OFFER randomized trial
notes: Secondary outcome analysis of OFFER trial - explicitly stated secondary analysis; also conducted in Poland

title: Effect of Metabolic Syndrome on Late-Life Depression: Associations with Disease Severity and Treatment Resistance
notes: Secondary analysis of an RCT examining metabolic syndrome as moderator - secondary analysis excluded

title: 12-week double-blind randomized multicenter study of agomelatine vs escitalopram in severe generalized anxiety disorder
notes: RCT of agomelatine vs escitalopram for severe GAD (DSM-5 diagnosis); multicenter international including Canadian site (Van Ameringen is Canadian); pharma for MH; results 2018

title: Adaptive crossover designs for assessment of symptomatic treatments targeting behaviour in neurodegenerative disease: FOXY trial
notes: Study protocol/design paper for FOXY trial - protocol without main results excluded

title: Concentration-Dependent Activity of Hydromethylthionine on Clinical Decline and Brain Atrophy in Behavioral Variant Frontotemporal Dementia
notes: Phase III RCT of hydromethylthionine in bvFTD; N=220; multicenter including Canadian site (Gauthier); pharma for MH; results 2020

title: Asenapine: Efficacy and safety of 5 and 10mg bid in a 3-week trial in adults with bipolar I disorder
notes: Phase IIIb RCT of asenapine vs placebo for acute bipolar I mania; international multicenter (McIntyre is Canadian co-author); pharma for MH; results 2016

title: The role of sleep quality and quantity in moderating the effectiveness of medication in the treatment of children with ADHD
notes: RCT of long-acting MPH vs placebo in children with ADHD; Canadian study (Corkum Dalhousie); N=21 small but randomized placebo-controlled; pharma for MH; results 2017

title: Asenapine for the treatment of adults with an acute exacerbation of schizophrenia
notes: RCT of asenapine vs placebo in acute schizophrenia exacerbation; international multicenter (McIntyre Canadian co-author); pharma for MH; results 2017

title: Striatal Activation Predicts Differential Therapeutic Responses to Methylphenidate and Atomoxetine
notes: Neuroimaging predictor study from a crossover trial; N=36; focus is on neuroimaging biomarker prediction not primary drug efficacy results; also US-based (no Canadian PI)

title: Association of BDNF HTR2A TPH1 SLC6A4 and COMT polymorphisms with tDCS and escitalopram efficacy
notes: Ancillary/secondary genetic analysis of ELECT-TDCS trial; conducted in Brazil not Canada; secondary analysis excluded

title: Minocycline as adjunctive treatment for major depressive disorder: Pooled data from two randomized controlled trials
notes: Pooled analysis of two separate RCTs - pooled/secondary analysis excluded; trials conducted in Pakistan and Australia not Canada

title: Rostral anterior cingulate network effective connectivity in depressed adolescents and associations with treatment response
notes: Neuroimaging secondary analysis of an Australian RCT (Davey CG Melbourne); not Canadian; secondary analysis excluded

title: Electrophysiological correlates and predictors of the antidepressant response to repeated ketamine infusions in treatment-resistant depression
notes: Canadian RCT of ketamine for TRD (Phillips and Blier Ottawa); EEG analysis but from the primary clinical trial; pharma for MH; results 2022

title: Amyloid-Related Imaging Abnormalities in the DIAN-TU-001 Trial of Gantenerumab and Solanezumab
notes: Secondary ARIA safety analysis of DIAN-TU trial - not primary efficacy results; secondary analysis excluded

title: Real-world effectiveness of repeated ketamine infusions for treatment-resistant bipolar depression
notes: Observational study (explicitly stated) not an RCT; Canadian site but non-randomized design excluded

title: Intravenous Ketamine for Late-Life Treatment-Resistant Depression: A Pilot Study
notes: Open-label pilot study without randomization - not an RCT; no control group; non-RCT excluded

title: The Montreal model: an integrative biomedical-psychedelic approach to ketamine for severe treatment-resistant depression
notes: Describes a clinical model/approach - not reporting RCT results; narrative/descriptive paper not an RCT
